2026-04-21T21:25:50.7090160Z   user-agent: actions/github-script
2026-04-21T21:25:50.7090900Z   result-encoding: json
2026-04-21T21:25:50.7091317Z   retries: 0
2026-04-21T21:25:50.7091726Z   retry-exempt-status-codes: 400,401,403,404,422
2026-04-21T21:25:50.7092229Z ##[endgroup]
2026-04-21T21:25:50.9840811Z Repository permission level: write
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0149332Z text: Cosmos: Cross-SDK Retry Behavior Comparison
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0354824Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0355396Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0356406Z ## Cosmos DB – Cross-SDK Retry Behavior Comparison
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0357037Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0358707Z This document compares the retry behavior across four Cosmos DB SDK implementations for **gateway-mode** (or gateway-equivalent) scenarios. The goal is to identify behavioral differences to guide the Rust Driver toward parity with the Python SDK (the designated source of truth).
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0362274Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0362846Z ### SDKs Compared
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0363224Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0363512Z | Label | SDK | Notes |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0365681Z |:------|:----|:------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0366669Z | **Python** | `azure-cosmos` (Python) | Source of truth for Rust Driver alignment |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0368016Z | **Java** | `azure-cosmos` (Java) — gateway mode | Gateway-specific behavior; direct-mode differences noted where relevant |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0369244Z | **.NET** | `Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos` (.NET) — gateway mode | Gateway-specific behavior |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0372824Z | **Rust Driver** | `azure_data_cosmos_driver` + `azure_data_cosmos` (Rust) | Two retry layers: SDK (`ClientRetryPolicy`) and Driver (`retry_evaluation.rs`). Driver is the newer layer for item operations. Where behavior differs between layers, cells show `SDK: ... / Driver: ...` |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0374423Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0374602Z ### Terminology
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0374821Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0375490Z - **Same-endpoint retry**: Retry on the same regional endpoint (possibly a different connection/shard). Handled at the transport level.
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0376764Z - **Cross-region retry**: Retry on a different regional endpoint. Handled at the operation level.
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0378181Z - **Budget**: Number of **retry attempts** (not total attempts) unless otherwise noted. For example, "budget = 2" means 2 retries after the initial attempt (3 total).
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0379818Z - **`retry_write`**: Python-specific per-request or client-level option that opts into retrying non-idempotent writes on timeout/5xx errors.
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0381030Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0381213Z ### Operation Classification
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0381498Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0381713Z | Category | Python | Java | .NET | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0382261Z |:---------|:-------|:-----|:-----|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0383517Z | **Read-only** | Read, ReadFeed, Query, Head | Read, ReadFeed, Query, Head, HeadFeed, SqlQuery, QueryPlan | Read, ReadFeed, Query, Head | Read, ReadFeed, Query, SqlQuery, QueryPlan, Head, HeadFeed |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0385027Z | **Idempotent write** | Replace, Delete | Replace, Delete | Replace, Delete | Replace, Delete |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0386378Z | **Non-idempotent write** | Create, Upsert, Batch, Execute | Create, Upsert, Batch, Execute | Create, Upsert, Batch, Execute | Create, Upsert, Batch, Execute |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0387300Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0387446Z ---
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0387625Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0388300Z ## Status Code Reference
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0390035Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0481394Z ### 400 — Bad Request
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0481990Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0482342Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0483052Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0483613Z | **Retried?** | No | No | No | No |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0485188Z | **400/1024 (Collection RID Mismatch)** | No (not special-cased by retry policy) | Yes — 1 retry after collection cache refresh (`StaleResourceRetryPolicy`) | No special gateway retry found | No |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0486990Z | **400/PK Mismatch** | N/A | Yes — 1 retry after collection cache refresh (`PartitionKeyMismatchRetryPolicy`) | N/A | N/A |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0487763Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0487970Z ### 401 — Unauthorized
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0488222Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0488514Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0489195Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0489760Z | **Retried?** | No | No | No | No |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0490067Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0490265Z ### 403/3 — Write Forbidden
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0490782Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0491074Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0491749Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0492312Z | **Retried?** | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0492782Z | **Read** | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0494470Z | **Write** | Yes — no idempotency or multi-write gate | Only if multi-write or PPAF eligible; single-write writes may not retry | Yes — endpoint failover; multi-master metadata writes route to hub | Yes — failover retry, no multi-write gate |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0496590Z | **Budget** | 120 retries | 120 retries | 120 retries | SDK: 120 retries; Driver: `max_failover_retry_count` (default 3) |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0497592Z | **Delay** | 1s | 1s | First retry 0ms; subsequent write retries 1s | 0ms |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0499513Z | **Side effects** | Marks endpoint unavailable; refreshes account properties; PPAF partition marking if applicable | Refreshes endpoints; marks endpoint unavailable | Refreshes endpoints; marks endpoint unavailable | Refreshes account properties; marks endpoint unavailable |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0502235Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0502525Z ### 403/1008 — Database Account Not Found
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0502861Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0503164Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0503839Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0504922Z | **Retried?** | Yes (same path as 403/3) | Read only; write only if multi-write | Read or multi-write only | No — not handled |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0505870Z | **Budget** | 120 retries | 120 retries | 120 retries | N/A |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0506275Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0506492Z ### 404/1002 — Read Session Not Available
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0506831Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0507113Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0507782Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0508331Z | **Retried?** | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0509169Z | **Single-write max retries** | 1 retry | 2 retries (3 total attempts) | 1 retry | SDK: 1 retry; Driver: 2 retries |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0510888Z | **Multi-write behavior** | Iterates all read/write locations | Iterates all applicable regions | Iterates all applicable regions | Iterates preferred endpoints |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0512911Z | **Session token clearing** | Single-write: cleared immediately; Multi-write: cleared on last attempt | Configurable via `SessionRetryOptions` | Not observed in gateway path | Not cleared during retry |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0514400Z | **Delay** | 0ms | 5ms initial, up to 500ms, 5s budget | 0ms | 0ms |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0516808Z | **PPAF integration** | Yes — routes to partition's primary if applicable | Configurable via `SessionRetryOptions.regionSwitchHint` (region-level, not partition-level) | Not observed | No |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0518040Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0518273Z ### 408 — Request Timeout
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0518537Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0521744Z > **Note**: Java and .NET handle client/network timeouts via separate transport-timeout policies (`WebExceptionRetryPolicy`/`HttpTimeoutPolicy`), not via their `ClientRetryPolicy` 408 branch. The entries below for Java/.NET reflect the combined effect of both layers. Python and Rust handle service-returned 408 distinctly from client-side deadline exceeded.
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0523880Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0524186Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0524868Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0528502Z | **Read retry** | Yes — cross-region; budget = `read_regions + 1` | Yes — via `WebExceptionRetryPolicy`; 2 retries (3 attempts) | No special `ClientRetryPolicy` branch; HTTP timeout policy handles transport timeouts (3 attempts) | No — not handled as distinct case |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0530814Z | **Write retry** | Only if `retry_write > 0` | No generic retry; PPAF/circuit-breaker may force | No | No |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0531934Z | **Delay** | 500ms | 0ms, 1s, 0ms (`HttpTimeoutPolicyDefault`) | Gateway HTTP client retry delays | N/A |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0532806Z | **PPAF/PPCB tracking** | Yes | Yes | Not observed | No |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0533219Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0533450Z ### 409 — Conflict
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0533665Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0534185Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0534866Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0535421Z | **Retried?** | No | No | No | No |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0535722Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0535946Z ### 410/1002 — Partition Key Range Gone
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0536270Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0536561Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0537221Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0538678Z | **Retried?** | Not by retry policy — refreshes routing map then re-raises | Yes — 1 retry after routing/collection cache refresh | No gateway retry branch found | Yes — generic 410 failover |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0540618Z | **Cache refresh** | Yes — partition key range cache | Yes — routing + collection cache | N/A | No — treated as generic Gone |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0542559Z | **Read vs write** | Both; retry is done by higher-level code (query engine) | Both | N/A | Reads + idempotent writes; non-idempotent Sent writes abort |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0544685Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0544987Z ### 410/1007 — Completing Split/Merge
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0545323Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0545619Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0546320Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0547405Z | **Retried?** | Not by retry policy; change feed handles it | No explicit gateway retry branch | No gateway retry branch found | Same as generic 410 |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0548266Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0548463Z ### 410/1022 — Lease Not Found
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0548737Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0549017Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0549678Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0550829Z | **Retried?** | Same as generic 410 | No distinct handling found | No distinct handling found | Same as generic 410 |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0551538Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0551754Z ### 412 — Precondition Failed
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0552031Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0552314Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0552976Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0553722Z | **Retried?** | No | No | No | No |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0554036Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0554233Z ### 429 — Too Many Requests
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0554496Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0555521Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0556738Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0557314Z | **Retried?** | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0557911Z | **Max retries** | 9 | 9 (10 total attempts) | 9 | SDK: 5; Driver: 9 |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0558637Z | **Max cumulative wait** | 30s | 30s | 30s | SDK: 200s; Driver: 30s |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0561043Z | **Delay strategy** | Server `x-ms-retry-after-ms`; fixed interval if configured; else 0 | Server `Retry-After`; absent: 0ms for 429/3200, else 100ms | Server `Retry-After`; fallback 5s | Driver: server `x-ms-retry-after-ms`, fallback exponential (5ms base, 2x, ±25% jitter, 5s cap) |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0562967Z | **Cross-region retry** | No | No | No | No (unless 429 survives transport layer) |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0563804Z | **Forced final retry** | No | No | No | Driver: yes, if deadline budget remains |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0564306Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0565479Z ### 429/3092 — System Resource Unavailable
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0568870Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0569219Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0569921Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0572389Z | **Special handling** | No — same as generic 429 | Same 429 throttle path; 100ms fallback delay | Multi-master write: treated as 503-like failover; single-master: normal 429 | SDK: multi-write writes → treated as 503 + partition failover; Driver: if escapes transport throttle, treated as 503/Gone failover |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0574994Z | **Cross-region escalation** | No | No | Yes (multi-master writes) | Yes (multi-write writes in SDK; all ops in Driver if it escapes transport) |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0575840Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0576039Z ### 449 — Retry With
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0576270Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0576565Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0577240Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0578374Z | **Retried?** | No | Mapped to `RetryWithException`; no dedicated gateway retry branch found | Not in `ClientRetryPolicy`; config-only knobs exist | No |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0579259Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0579462Z ### 500 — Internal Server Error
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0579746Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0580030Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0580927Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0581946Z | **Read retry** | Yes — cross-region; budget = `read_regions + 1` | No | Yes — 1 cross-region retry | Yes — failover retry |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0583041Z | **Write retry** | Only if `retry_write > 0` | No | No | No (SDK); idempotent writes only (Driver) |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0583776Z | **Delay** | 500ms | N/A | 0ms | 0ms |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0584915Z | **PPAF/PPCB tracking** | Yes | Circuit-breaker side effects only | Not observed | No |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0585859Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0586133Z ### 500+ — Other Server Errors (502, 504, etc.)
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0586478Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0586771Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0587448Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0588954Z | **Read retry** | Yes — same as 500; budget = `read_regions + 1` | No | Not observed | SDK: yes (generic read failover for non-explicitly-non-retryable codes); Driver: no (only 500 is special-cased) |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0594455Z | **Write retry** | Only if `retry_write > 0` | No | No | No |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0596498Z | **Note** | Python treats all 5xx (excluding 503) uniformly via `TimeoutFailoverRetryPolicy` | Only 503 has special handling | Only 500 and 503 have special handling | Driver only handles 500 (reads) and 503; other 5xx abort |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0597816Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0598150Z ### 503 — Service Unavailable ⚠️ Key Divergence
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0598652Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0598971Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0599651Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0600220Z | **Read retry** | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0603244Z | **Write retry** | **Yes — always; no idempotency gate, no multi-write gate** | Reads: yes; writes: conditional (multi-region/PPAF/server-generated) | Yes — but only if multi-write or PPAF allows; single-write writes typically not retried | **SDK: gated on `can_use_multiple_write_locations`** — single-write writes NOT retried; **Driver: gated on `is_idempotent()`** — non-idempotent writes NOT retried regardless of account type |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0606531Z | **Budget** | Reads: `read_regions + 1`; Writes: `write_regions + 1` | Max 2 retries | Max 1 cross-region retry | SDK: `applicable_endpoints.len()` (dynamic); Driver: `max_failover_retry_count` (default 3) |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0607800Z | **Delay** | 500ms | 0ms | 0ms | 0ms |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0608990Z | **PPAF/PPCB tracking** | Yes | Yes (circuit breaker) | Yes (`GlobalPartitionEndpointManagerCore`) | SDK: yes (partition marking); Driver: partition marking via `LocationEffect` |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0610027Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0610218Z ### Container Recreate (400/1024, 404/10004)
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0610729Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0611020Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0611840Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0613623Z | **Retried?** | Yes — 1 retry after container cache refresh | Yes — 1 retry (`StaleResourceRetryPolicy`; note: PK mismatch is a separate policy) | `RenameCollectionAwareClientRetryPolicy` handles stale name/session cleanup | No |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0616455Z | **Trigger** | 400/1024 or 404/10004 | 400/1024 (incorrect container RID) | Stale collection name / session | Not implemented |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0617203Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0617340Z ---
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0617522Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0617691Z ## Connection Errors
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0617922Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0618111Z ### Transport-Level Retry (Same Endpoint)
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0618455Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0618746Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0619422Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0621360Z | **Request not sent** | Retried locally (configurable via `retry_total`, `retry_connect`) | `WebExceptionRetryPolicy`: 2 retries (3 attempts) | `CosmosHttpClientCore`: 3 attempts with `HttpTimeoutPolicy` | Driver: 1 local connectivity retry on different shard |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0641041Z | **Request sent, read** | Retried locally | Retried | Retried | Retried (1 local retry if read-only or idempotent) |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0643503Z | **Request sent, write** | NOT retried at transport level | Not retried | Retried (same as reads in gateway HTTP layer) | NOT retried for non-idempotent writes at transport level |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0644575Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0644776Z ### Cross-Region Retry (Operation Level)
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0645120Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0645415Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0646100Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0647575Z | **Request not sent (reads)** | Yes — cross-region | Yes — endpoint failover | Yes — marks both read+write endpoint unavailable, retries preferred regions | Yes — failover retry |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0649435Z | **Request not sent (writes)** | Yes — cross-region (request never reached service) | Yes — endpoint failover | Yes — same as reads | Yes — failover retry |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0651455Z | **Request sent, read** | Yes — cross-region | Yes — endpoint failover | Yes | Yes — failover retry |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0652665Z | **Request sent, idempotent write** | Only if `retry_write > 0` | Not retried | Yes | Yes — failover retry |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0653849Z | **Request sent, non-idempotent write** | Only if `retry_write > 0` | Not retried | Yes | **No — ABORT** |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0655747Z | **Budget** | `ServiceRequestError`: routing contexts; `ServiceResponseError`: `retry_write` for writes | Endpoint failover limit | 120 failover retries | SDK: 3 same-endpoint then failover (120 cap); Driver: `max_failover_retry_count` (default 3) |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0657181Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0657319Z ---
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0657502Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0657684Z ## Client Options Affecting Retry
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0657984Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0658281Z | Option | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0658956Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0660182Z | **Retry non-idempotent writes** | `RetryNonIdempotentWrites` (client) + per-request `retry_write` kwarg; Patch excluded | Not found | Not found | Not implemented |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0662533Z | **Max throttle retries** | `RetryOptions.MaxRetryAttemptCount` (default 9) | `ThrottlingRetryOptions.maxRetryAttemptsOnThrottledRequests` (default 9) | `CosmosClientOptions` (default 9) | SDK: 5; Driver: 9 |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0664668Z | **Max throttle wait** | `RetryOptions.MaxWaitTimeInSeconds` (default 30s) | `ThrottlingRetryOptions.maxRetryWaitTime` (default 30s) | 30s | SDK: 200s; Driver: 30s |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0666704Z | **Preferred regions** | `preferred_locations` | `preferredRegions` | `ApplicationPreferredRegions` / `ApplicationRegion` | `preferred_regions` |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0668647Z | **Multiple write locations** | `enable_multiple_writable_locations` (auto-detected) | `multipleWriteRegionsEnabled` | `UseMultipleWriteLocations` | `can_use_multiple_write_locations` (auto-detected) |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0670817Z | **Session retry options** | No tuning knobs | `SessionRetryOptions` (region switch hint, in-region retry count/time) | `SessionRetryOptions` | No tuning knobs |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0672688Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0672845Z ---
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0673033Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0673202Z ## Default Retry Limits Summary
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0673498Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0673810Z | Parameter | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0674624Z |:----------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0675393Z | **Endpoint failover budget** | 120 | 120 | 120 | SDK: 120; Driver: 3 (configurable) |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0676379Z | **503 retry budget** | `regions + 1` (dynamic) | Max 2 | Max 1 | SDK: `endpoints.len()` (dynamic); Driver: 3 |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0677271Z | **404/1002 single-write retries** | 1 | 2 | 1 | SDK: 1; Driver: 2 |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0678323Z | **404/1002 multi-write retries** | All locations | All applicable regions | All applicable regions | All preferred endpoints |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0679294Z | **429 max retries** | 9 | 9 | 9 | SDK: 5; Driver: 9 |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0679959Z | **429 max cumulative wait** | 30s | 30s | 30s | SDK: 200s; Driver: 30s |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0681807Z | **429 delay strategy** | Server header; fixed interval; else 0 | Server header; else 0ms (3200) / 100ms | Server header; fallback 5s | Server header; exponential backoff (5ms base, 2x, ±25% jitter, 5s cap) |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0683788Z | **Transport same-endpoint retries** | Configurable (azure-core retry settings) | 2 retries (3 attempts) | 3 attempts (`HttpTimeoutPolicy`) | 1 local connectivity retry |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0685030Z | **403/3 delay** | 1s | 1s | 0ms first, 1s subsequent | 0ms |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0685428Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0685566Z ---
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0685748Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0685969Z ## Key Gaps: Rust Driver vs Python (Source of Truth)
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0686348Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0686800Z | # | Gap | Python Behavior | Rust Driver Behavior | Impact |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0687428Z |:--|:----|:----------------|:---------------------|:-------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0689314Z | 1 | **503 write retry** | Always retried for all writes; budget = `write_regions + 1` | SDK: gated on `can_use_multiple_write_locations`; Driver: gated on `is_idempotent()` — non-idempotent writes ABORT | Single-write Upsert/Create on 503 fails instead of retrying |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0704907Z | 2 | **408 handling** | Reads cross-region retry; writes if `retry_write > 0` | Not handled as a distinct retryable case | 408 errors on reads are not retried |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0706792Z | 3 | **`RetryNonIdempotentWrites`** | Client-level + per-request `retry_write`; gates 408/5xx write retries | Not implemented | No opt-in for non-idempotent write retries on timeout/5xx |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0708330Z | 4 | **403/1008** | Same retry path as 403/3 | Not handled | Database account not found errors not retried |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0709901Z | 5 | **410 substatus differentiation** | 410/1002 refreshes PK range cache; 410/1007 handled in change feed | All 410s treated as generic Gone failover | No targeted cache refresh on partition split |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0712197Z | 6 | **404/1002 single-write retries** | 1 retry | SDK: 1 retry (Python parity); Driver: 2 retries (Java parity) | Minor: Driver is more generous than Python; SDK matches |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0713907Z | 7 | **Session token clearing** | Single-write: immediate; Multi-write: last attempt | Not cleared during retry | Stale session tokens may propagate |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0715606Z | 8 | **Container recreate** | 1 retry after cache refresh (400/1024, 404/10004) | Not implemented | Stale container RID not recovered |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0716839Z | 9 | **Failover budget** | Dynamic: `regions + 1` | Driver: fixed 3 | Underutilizes available regions |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0718644Z | 10 | **PPAF/PPCB in retry decisions** | Integrated into 503, 408/5xx, session, connection retry paths | SDK has PPAF/PPCB; Driver retry_evaluation.rs is not PPAF-aware | Partition-level failover not considered in driver retry decisions |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0722569Z | 11 | **Other 5xx (502, 504, etc.)** | Reads retried cross-region; writes if `retry_write > 0` | Driver: not retried (only 500 reads and 503 special-cased) | 502/504 read errors are not retried in driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0723973Z title: Cosmos: Cross-SDK Retry Behavior Comparison
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0724841Z body: ## Cosmos DB – Cross-SDK Retry Behavior Comparison
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0725256Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0726716Z This document compares the retry behavior across four Cosmos DB SDK implementations for **gateway-mode** (or gateway-equivalent) scenarios. The goal is to identify behavioral differences to guide the Rust Driver toward parity with the Python SDK (the designated source of truth).
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0728362Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0728517Z ### SDKs Compared
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0728733Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0728903Z | Label | SDK | Notes |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0729288Z |:------|:----|:------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0729883Z | **Python** | `azure-cosmos` (Python) | Source of truth for Rust Driver alignment |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0731332Z | **Java** | `azure-cosmos` (Java) — gateway mode | Gateway-specific behavior; direct-mode differences noted where relevant |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0732542Z | **.NET** | `Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos` (.NET) — gateway mode | Gateway-specific behavior |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0734461Z | **Rust Driver** | `azure_data_cosmos_driver` + `azure_data_cosmos` (Rust) | Two retry layers: SDK (`ClientRetryPolicy`) and Driver (`retry_evaluation.rs`). Driver is the newer layer for item operations. Where behavior differs between layers, cells show `SDK: ... / Driver: ...` |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0736002Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0736157Z ### Terminology
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0736361Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0737192Z - **Same-endpoint retry**: Retry on the same regional endpoint (possibly a different connection/shard). Handled at the transport level.
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0738524Z - **Cross-region retry**: Retry on a different regional endpoint. Handled at the operation level.
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0739918Z - **Budget**: Number of **retry attempts** (not total attempts) unless otherwise noted. For example, "budget = 2" means 2 retries after the initial attempt (3 total).
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0741744Z - **`retry_write`**: Python-specific per-request or client-level option that opts into retrying non-idempotent writes on timeout/5xx errors.
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0742625Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0742797Z ### Operation Classification
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0743083Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0743304Z | Category | Python | Java | .NET | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0743850Z |:---------|:-------|:-----|:-----|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0745111Z | **Read-only** | Read, ReadFeed, Query, Head | Read, ReadFeed, Query, Head, HeadFeed, SqlQuery, QueryPlan | Read, ReadFeed, Query, Head | Read, ReadFeed, Query, SqlQuery, QueryPlan, Head, HeadFeed |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0746625Z | **Idempotent write** | Replace, Delete | Replace, Delete | Replace, Delete | Replace, Delete |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0747963Z | **Non-idempotent write** | Create, Upsert, Batch, Execute | Create, Upsert, Batch, Execute | Create, Upsert, Batch, Execute | Create, Upsert, Batch, Execute |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0748883Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0749025Z ---
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0749205Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0749371Z ## Status Code Reference
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0749624Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0749837Z ### 400 — Bad Request
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0750071Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0750535Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0751366Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0751920Z | **Retried?** | No | No | No | No |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0753779Z | **400/1024 (Collection RID Mismatch)** | No (not special-cased by retry policy) | Yes — 1 retry after collection cache refresh (`StaleResourceRetryPolicy`) | No special gateway retry found | No |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0756186Z | **400/PK Mismatch** | N/A | Yes — 1 retry after collection cache refresh (`PartitionKeyMismatchRetryPolicy`) | N/A | N/A |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0756934Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0757120Z ### 401 — Unauthorized
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0757363Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0757652Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0758331Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0758885Z | **Retried?** | No | No | No | No |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0759186Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0759397Z ### 403/3 — Write Forbidden
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0759659Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0759940Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0760834Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0761390Z | **Retried?** | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0761863Z | **Read** | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0763552Z | **Write** | Yes — no idempotency or multi-write gate | Only if multi-write or PPAF eligible; single-write writes may not retry | Yes — endpoint failover; multi-master metadata writes route to hub | Yes — failover retry, no multi-write gate |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0765430Z | **Budget** | 120 retries | 120 retries | 120 retries | SDK: 120 retries; Driver: `max_failover_retry_count` (default 3) |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0766406Z | **Delay** | 1s | 1s | First retry 0ms; subsequent write retries 1s | 0ms |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0768334Z | **Side effects** | Marks endpoint unavailable; refreshes account properties; PPAF partition marking if applicable | Refreshes endpoints; marks endpoint unavailable | Refreshes endpoints; marks endpoint unavailable | Refreshes account properties; marks endpoint unavailable |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0769964Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0770194Z ### 403/1008 — Database Account Not Found
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0770685Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0771122Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0771814Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0772871Z | **Retried?** | Yes (same path as 403/3) | Read only; write only if multi-write | Read or multi-write only | No — not handled |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0773830Z | **Budget** | 120 retries | 120 retries | 120 retries | N/A |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0774237Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0774452Z ### 404/1002 — Read Session Not Available
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0774769Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0775071Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0775872Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0776442Z | **Retried?** | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0777277Z | **Single-write max retries** | 1 retry | 2 retries (3 total attempts) | 1 retry | SDK: 1 retry; Driver: 2 retries |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0778764Z | **Multi-write behavior** | Iterates all read/write locations | Iterates all applicable regions | Iterates all applicable regions | Iterates preferred endpoints |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0780942Z | **Session token clearing** | Single-write: cleared immediately; Multi-write: cleared on last attempt | Configurable via `SessionRetryOptions` | Not observed in gateway path | Not cleared during retry |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0783189Z | **Delay** | 0ms | 5ms initial, up to 500ms, 5s budget | 0ms | 0ms |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0784776Z | **PPAF integration** | Yes — routes to partition's primary if applicable | Configurable via `SessionRetryOptions.regionSwitchHint` (region-level, not partition-level) | Not observed | No |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0786086Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0786284Z ### 408 — Request Timeout
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0786536Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0788424Z > **Note**: Java and .NET handle client/network timeouts via separate transport-timeout policies (`WebExceptionRetryPolicy`/`HttpTimeoutPolicy`), not via their `ClientRetryPolicy` 408 branch. The entries below for Java/.NET reflect the combined effect of both layers. Python and Rust handle service-returned 408 distinctly from client-side deadline exceeded.
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0790660Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0790966Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0791635Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0793544Z | **Read retry** | Yes — cross-region; budget = `read_regions + 1` | Yes — via `WebExceptionRetryPolicy`; 2 retries (3 attempts) | No special `ClientRetryPolicy` branch; HTTP timeout policy handles transport timeouts (3 attempts) | No — not handled as distinct case |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0795500Z | **Write retry** | Only if `retry_write > 0` | No generic retry; PPAF/circuit-breaker may force | No | No |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0796685Z | **Delay** | 500ms | 0ms, 1s, 0ms (`HttpTimeoutPolicyDefault`) | Gateway HTTP client retry delays | N/A |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0797562Z | **PPAF/PPCB tracking** | Yes | Yes | Not observed | No |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0797964Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0798161Z ### 409 — Conflict
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0798373Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0798667Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0799332Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0799880Z | **Retried?** | No | No | No | No |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0800182Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0800567Z ### 410/1002 — Partition Key Range Gone
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0800896Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0801182Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0801855Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0803346Z | **Retried?** | Not by retry policy — refreshes routing map then re-raises | Yes — 1 retry after routing/collection cache refresh | No gateway retry branch found | Yes — generic 410 failover |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0805224Z | **Cache refresh** | Yes — partition key range cache | Yes — routing + collection cache | N/A | No — treated as generic Gone |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0806665Z | **Read vs write** | Both; retry is done by higher-level code (query engine) | Both | N/A | Reads + idempotent writes; non-idempotent Sent writes abort |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0807520Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0807742Z ### 410/1007 — Completing Split/Merge
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0808056Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0808338Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0809008Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0810078Z | **Retried?** | Not by retry policy; change feed handles it | No explicit gateway retry branch | No gateway retry branch found | Same as generic 410 |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0811146Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0811353Z ### 410/1022 — Lease Not Found
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0811626Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0811914Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0812571Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0814380Z | **Retried?** | Same as generic 410 | No distinct handling found | No distinct handling found | Same as generic 410 |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0815077Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0815318Z ### 412 — Precondition Failed
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0815593Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0815878Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0816548Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0817103Z | **Retried?** | No | No | No | No |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0817509Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0817712Z ### 429 — Too Many Requests
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0818160Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0818442Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0819107Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0819655Z | **Retried?** | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0820252Z | **Max retries** | 9 | 9 (10 total attempts) | 9 | SDK: 5; Driver: 9 |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0821206Z | **Max cumulative wait** | 30s | 30s | 30s | SDK: 200s; Driver: 30s |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0823283Z | **Delay strategy** | Server `x-ms-retry-after-ms`; fixed interval if configured; else 0 | Server `Retry-After`; absent: 0ms for 429/3200, else 100ms | Server `Retry-After`; fallback 5s | Driver: server `x-ms-retry-after-ms`, fallback exponential (5ms base, 2x, ±25% jitter, 5s cap) |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0825182Z | **Cross-region retry** | No | No | No | No (unless 429 survives transport layer) |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0826007Z | **Forced final retry** | No | No | No | Driver: yes, if deadline budget remains |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0826516Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0826740Z ### 429/3092 — System Resource Unavailable
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0827067Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0827358Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0828025Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0830183Z | **Special handling** | No — same as generic 429 | Same 429 throttle path; 100ms fallback delay | Multi-master write: treated as 503-like failover; single-master: normal 429 | SDK: multi-write writes → treated as 503 + partition failover; Driver: if escapes transport throttle, treated as 503/Gone failover |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0832734Z | **Cross-region escalation** | No | No | Yes (multi-master writes) | Yes (multi-write writes in SDK; all ops in Driver if it escapes transport) |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0833568Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0833763Z ### 449 — Retry With
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0833992Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0834282Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0834962Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0836085Z | **Retried?** | No | Mapped to `RetryWithException`; no dedicated gateway retry branch found | Not in `ClientRetryPolicy`; config-only knobs exist | No |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0836977Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0837178Z ### 500 — Internal Server Error
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0837575Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0837873Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0838552Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0839579Z | **Read retry** | Yes — cross-region; budget = `read_regions + 1` | No | Yes — 1 cross-region retry | Yes — failover retry |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0840864Z | **Write retry** | Only if `retry_write > 0` | No | No | No (SDK); idempotent writes only (Driver) |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0841607Z | **Delay** | 500ms | N/A | 0ms | 0ms |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0842299Z | **PPAF/PPCB tracking** | Yes | Circuit-breaker side effects only | Not observed | No |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0842869Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0843118Z ### 500+ — Other Server Errors (502, 504, etc.)
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0843458Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0843748Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0844409Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0845887Z | **Read retry** | Yes — same as 500; budget = `read_regions + 1` | No | Not observed | SDK: yes (generic read failover for non-explicitly-non-retryable codes); Driver: no (only 500 is special-cased) |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0847222Z | **Write retry** | Only if `retry_write > 0` | No | No | No |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0848747Z | **Note** | Python treats all 5xx (excluding 503) uniformly via `TimeoutFailoverRetryPolicy` | Only 503 has special handling | Only 500 and 503 have special handling | Driver only handles 500 (reads) and 503; other 5xx abort |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0850918Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0851362Z ### 503 — Service Unavailable ⚠️ Key Divergence
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0851729Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0852017Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0852688Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0853246Z | **Read retry** | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0856042Z | **Write retry** | **Yes — always; no idempotency gate, no multi-write gate** | Reads: yes; writes: conditional (multi-region/PPAF/server-generated) | Yes — but only if multi-write or PPAF allows; single-write writes typically not retried | **SDK: gated on `can_use_multiple_write_locations`** — single-write writes NOT retried; **Driver: gated on `is_idempotent()`** — non-idempotent writes NOT retried regardless of account type |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0859306Z | **Budget** | Reads: `read_regions + 1`; Writes: `write_regions + 1` | Max 2 retries | Max 1 cross-region retry | SDK: `applicable_endpoints.len()` (dynamic); Driver: `max_failover_retry_count` (default 3) |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0860782Z | **Delay** | 500ms | 0ms | 0ms | 0ms |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0861987Z | **PPAF/PPCB tracking** | Yes | Yes (circuit breaker) | Yes (`GlobalPartitionEndpointManagerCore`) | SDK: yes (partition marking); Driver: partition marking via `LocationEffect` |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0863032Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0863231Z ### Container Recreate (400/1024, 404/10004)
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0863561Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0863848Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0864511Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0866242Z | **Retried?** | Yes — 1 retry after container cache refresh | Yes — 1 retry (`StaleResourceRetryPolicy`; note: PK mismatch is a separate policy) | `RenameCollectionAwareClientRetryPolicy` handles stale name/session cleanup | No |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0868141Z | **Trigger** | 400/1024 or 404/10004 | 400/1024 (incorrect container RID) | Stale collection name / session | Not implemented |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0868881Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0869116Z ---
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0869301Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0869463Z ## Connection Errors
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0869690Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0869872Z ### Transport-Level Retry (Same Endpoint)
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0870209Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0870763Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0871456Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0873163Z | **Request not sent** | Retried locally (configurable via `retry_total`, `retry_connect`) | `WebExceptionRetryPolicy`: 2 retries (3 attempts) | `CosmosHttpClientCore`: 3 attempts with `HttpTimeoutPolicy` | Driver: 1 local connectivity retry on different shard |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0875164Z | **Request sent, read** | Retried locally | Retried | Retried | Retried (1 local retry if read-only or idempotent) |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0876706Z | **Request sent, write** | NOT retried at transport level | Not retried | Retried (same as reads in gateway HTTP layer) | NOT retried for non-idempotent writes at transport level |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0881510Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0881717Z ### Cross-Region Retry (Operation Level)
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0882056Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0882348Z | Aspect | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0883040Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0884473Z | **Request not sent (reads)** | Yes — cross-region | Yes — endpoint failover | Yes — marks both read+write endpoint unavailable, retries preferred regions | Yes — failover retry |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0886317Z | **Request not sent (writes)** | Yes — cross-region (request never reached service) | Yes — endpoint failover | Yes — same as reads | Yes — failover retry |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0887704Z | **Request sent, read** | Yes — cross-region | Yes — endpoint failover | Yes | Yes — failover retry |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0888873Z | **Request sent, idempotent write** | Only if `retry_write > 0` | Not retried | Yes | Yes — failover retry |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0890225Z | **Request sent, non-idempotent write** | Only if `retry_write > 0` | Not retried | Yes | **No — ABORT** |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0892444Z | **Budget** | `ServiceRequestError`: routing contexts; `ServiceResponseError`: `retry_write` for writes | Endpoint failover limit | 120 failover retries | SDK: 3 same-endpoint then failover (120 cap); Driver: `max_failover_retry_count` (default 3) |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0893864Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0894006Z ---
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0894189Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0894362Z ## Client Options Affecting Retry
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0894661Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0894947Z | Option | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0895620Z |:-------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0896832Z | **Retry non-idempotent writes** | `RetryNonIdempotentWrites` (client) + per-request `retry_write` kwarg; Patch excluded | Not found | Not found | Not implemented |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0898959Z | **Max throttle retries** | `RetryOptions.MaxRetryAttemptCount` (default 9) | `ThrottlingRetryOptions.maxRetryAttemptsOnThrottledRequests` (default 9) | `CosmosClientOptions` (default 9) | SDK: 5; Driver: 9 |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0901268Z | **Max throttle wait** | `RetryOptions.MaxWaitTimeInSeconds` (default 30s) | `ThrottlingRetryOptions.maxRetryWaitTime` (default 30s) | 30s | SDK: 200s; Driver: 30s |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0903025Z | **Preferred regions** | `preferred_locations` | `preferredRegions` | `ApplicationPreferredRegions` / `ApplicationRegion` | `preferred_regions` |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0904999Z | **Multiple write locations** | `enable_multiple_writable_locations` (auto-detected) | `multipleWriteRegionsEnabled` | `UseMultipleWriteLocations` | `can_use_multiple_write_locations` (auto-detected) |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0907387Z | **Session retry options** | No tuning knobs | `SessionRetryOptions` (region switch hint, in-region retry count/time) | `SessionRetryOptions` | No tuning knobs |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0908811Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0908962Z ---
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0909146Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0909311Z ## Default Retry Limits Summary
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0909595Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0909907Z | Parameter | Python | Java (Gateway) | .NET (Gateway) | Rust Driver |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0910960Z |:----------|:-------|:---------------|:---------------|:------------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0911733Z | **Endpoint failover budget** | 120 | 120 | 120 | SDK: 120; Driver: 3 (configurable) |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0912713Z | **503 retry budget** | `regions + 1` (dynamic) | Max 2 | Max 1 | SDK: `endpoints.len()` (dynamic); Driver: 3 |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0913636Z | **404/1002 single-write retries** | 1 | 2 | 1 | SDK: 1; Driver: 2 |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0914681Z | **404/1002 multi-write retries** | All locations | All applicable regions | All applicable regions | All preferred endpoints |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0915651Z | **429 max retries** | 9 | 9 | 9 | SDK: 5; Driver: 9 |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0916313Z | **429 max cumulative wait** | 30s | 30s | 30s | SDK: 200s; Driver: 30s |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0917963Z | **429 delay strategy** | Server header; fixed interval; else 0 | Server header; else 0ms (3200) / 100ms | Server header; fallback 5s | Server header; exponential backoff (5ms base, 2x, ±25% jitter, 5s cap) |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0919947Z | **Transport same-endpoint retries** | Configurable (azure-core retry settings) | 2 retries (3 attempts) | 3 attempts (`HttpTimeoutPolicy`) | 1 local connectivity retry |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0921372Z | **403/3 delay** | 1s | 1s | 0ms first, 1s subsequent | 0ms |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0921781Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0921921Z ---
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0922095Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0922323Z ## Key Gaps: Rust Driver vs Python (Source of Truth)
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0922697Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0922944Z | # | Gap | Python Behavior | Rust Driver Behavior | Impact |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0923641Z |:--|:----|:----------------|:---------------------|:-------|
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0925640Z | 1 | **503 write retry** | Always retried for all writes; budget = `write_regions + 1` | SDK: gated on `can_use_multiple_write_locations`; Driver: gated on `is_idempotent()` — non-idempotent writes ABORT | Single-write Upsert/Create on 503 fails instead of retrying |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0927814Z | 2 | **408 handling** | Reads cross-region retry; writes if `retry_write > 0` | Not handled as a distinct retryable case | 408 errors on reads are not retried |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0929610Z | 3 | **`RetryNonIdempotentWrites`** | Client-level + per-request `retry_write`; gates 408/5xx write retries | Not implemented | No opt-in for non-idempotent write retries on timeout/5xx |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0931324Z | 4 | **403/1008** | Same retry path as 403/3 | Not handled | Database account not found errors not retried |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0932888Z | 5 | **410 substatus differentiation** | 410/1002 refreshes PK range cache; 410/1007 handled in change feed | All 410s treated as generic Gone failover | No targeted cache refresh on partition split |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0934787Z | 6 | **404/1002 single-write retries** | 1 retry | SDK: 1 retry (Python parity); Driver: 2 retries (Java parity) | Minor: Driver is more generous than Python; SDK matches |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0937345Z | 7 | **Session token clearing** | Single-write: immediate; Multi-write: last attempt | Not cleared during retry | Stale session tokens may propagate |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0938845Z | 8 | **Container recreate** | 1 retry after cache refresh (400/1024, 404/10004) | Not implemented | Stale container RID not recovered |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0940142Z | 9 | **Failover budget** | Dynamic: `regions + 1` | Driver: fixed 3 | Underutilizes available regions |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0942164Z | 10 | **PPAF/PPCB in retry decisions** | Integrated into 503, 408/5xx, session, connection retry paths | SDK has PPAF/PPCB; Driver retry_evaluation.rs is not PPAF-aware | Partition-level failover not considered in driver retry decisions |
2026-04-21T21:25:51.0944426Z | 11 | **Other 5xx (502, 504, etc.)** | Reads retried cross-region; writes if `retry_write > 0` | Driver: not retried (only 500 reads and 503 special-cased) | 502/504 read errors are not retried in driver |

2026-04-21T21:25:51.4150155Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4150508Z # Agentic Triage
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4150737Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4151194Z You are a triage assistant for GitHub issues. Analyze issue #4242 and perform initial triage.
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4151805Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4151994Z 1. Retrieve issue content using `get_issue`
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4152331Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4152820Z    - If the issue is spam, bot-generated, or not actionable, add a one-sentence analysis comment and exit
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4153934Z    - If the issue is already assigned, has labels, or has a parent issue, exit
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4154445Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4154659Z 2. Use GitHub tools to gather additional context
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4155019Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4155446Z    - Do not run shell commands like `gh label list` - rely on labels inferred from repo context
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4156221Z    - Fetch comments using `get_issue_comments`
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4156761Z    - Find similar issues using `search_issues`
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4157355Z    - Find linked pull requests using `search_pull_requests`
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4157932Z    - List open issues using `list_issues`
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4158260Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4158525Z 3. Analyze issue content
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4158776Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4159557Z    - Title and description
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4160073Z    - Type: bug report, feature request, question, etc.
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4160836Z    - Technical areas mentioned
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4161285Z    - Severity or priority indicators
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4161754Z    - User impact
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4162195Z    - Crate names beginning with `azure` or `typespec`
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4162753Z    - Changed files in linked pull requests
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4163088Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4163637Z 4. Write notes, ideas, nudges, resource links, debugging strategies, and reproduction steps relevant to the issue
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4164351Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4164606Z 5. Select appropriate labels from available repo labels
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4165011Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4165390Z    - All issues should have a #ffeb77 colored type label
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4166060Z      - `Client` - crates not starting with `azure_resourcemanager_`
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4166934Z      - `Mgmt` - crates starting with `azure_resourcemanager_` or mentions of ARM or Resource Manager
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4167838Z      - `Service` - REST API or service behavior outside client SDK control
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4168762Z    - Tag issues from users without repo write access as `customer-reported` and `needs-team-attention`
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4169713Z    - Tag questions (not bug reports or feature requests) with `question`
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4170879Z    - Add `EngSys` service label for issues with scripts, workflows, or pipelines under /eng but not /eng/common
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4171850Z    - Use labels from similar issues for #e99695 colored service labels
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4172954Z    - If pull requests are linked to similar issues, check those pull requests' file paths against matching patterns in /.github/CODEOWNERS
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4174858Z      - If matches are found, use the `PRLabel` value in a comment above those lines (e.g. `PRLabel: %KeyVault`) to find related `ServiceLabel`s (e.g. `ServiceLabel: %KeyVault`) grouped with `AzureSDKOwners` and `ServiceOwners`
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4176374Z      - Strip leading `@` from users and groups when assigning issues
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4176984Z      - Strip leading `%` from labels
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4177516Z      - Add #e99695 colored service labels from `ServiceLabel`
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4178634Z      - If `Client` is applicable and there are `AzureSDKOwners`, assign to a random owner; if only `ServiceOwners` exist, add `Service Attention`
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4179660Z      - Comment using this template when routing:
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4180024Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4180171Z        ```markdown
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4181225Z        Thank you for your feedback. Tagging and routing to the team members best able to assist. cc {{ `AzureSDKOwners` each prefaced with `@` }}
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4182188Z        ```
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4182385Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4182752Z      - If `Service` is applicable, add applicable labels and `needs-triage`, then exit
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4183691Z    - All issues should have a #e99695 colored service label describing the relevant service
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4184793Z    - If unable to apply exactly one #ffeb77 type label and at least one #e99695 service label, apply only `needs-triage`
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4186130Z    - Add `needs-team-triage` if labels are added but `Service Attention` is not used and no person is assigned
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4186803Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4186973Z 6. Apply selected labels
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4187223Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4187403Z    - Use `update_issue` to apply labels
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4187916Z    - Do not apply labels if none clearly apply
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4188507Z    - Do not add comments beyond the markdown templates above
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4188904Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4189095Z 7. Add an issue comment with your analysis
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4189537Z 
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4189821Z    - Start with "🎯 Agentic Issue Triage"
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4190763Z    - Brief summary of the issue
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4191333Z    - Relevant details to help the team understand the issue
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4192009Z    - Debugging strategies or reproduction steps if applicable
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4192773Z    - Helpful resources or links related to the issue or affected codebase area
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4193485Z    - Nudges or ideas for addressing the issue
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4194086Z    - Break down into sub-tasks with a checklist if appropriate
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4195016Z    - Use collapsed-by-default GitHub markdown sections; collapse all sections except the short main summary
2026-04-21T21:25:51.4195701Z
